33.gl: a stream, especially a winter torrent; (by implication) a (narrow) valley (in which a brook runs); also a shaft (of a mine)
33.dv: or (feminine) נַחְלָה; (Psalm 124:4), or נַחֲלָה; (Ezekiel 47:19; Ezekiel 48:28), from H5157 (נָחַל) in its original sense;

33.gl: the sun; by implication, the east; figuratively, a ray, i.e. (architectural) a notched battlement
33.kj: [phrase] east side(-ward), sun (rising), [phrase] west(-ward), window. See also H1053 (בֵּית שֶׁמֶשׁ).
33.dv: from an unused root meaning to be brilliant;

33.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
33.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
33.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

33.gl: the Arnon, a river east of the Jordan, also its territory
33.dv: or אַרְנֹןlemma אַרְנן missing vowel, corrected to אַרְנֹן; from H7442 (רָנַן); a brawling stream;

33.gl: Aroer, the name of three places in or near Palestine
33.dv: or עֲרֹעֵר; or עַרְעוֹר; the same as H6176 (עֲרוֹעֵר); nudity of situation;

33.gl: Gilad, a region East of the Jordan; also the name of three Israelites

34.gl: a word; by implication, a matter (as spoken of) or thing; adverbially, a cause
34.kj: act, advice, affair, answer, [idiom] any such (thing), because of, book, business, care, case, cause, certain rate, [phrase] chronicles, commandment, [idiom] commune(-ication), [ph

34.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
34.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

34.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
34.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
34.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

34.gl: properly, an overhanging, i.e. (by implication) an excess, superiority, remainder; also a small rope (as hanging free)
34.kj: [phrase] abundant, cord, exceeding, excellancy(-ent), what they leave, that hath left, plentifully, remnant, residue, rest, string, with.

34.gl: properly, writing (the art or a document); by implication, a book
34.kj: bill, book, evidence, [idiom] learn(-ed) (-ing), letter, register, scroll.

34.gl: force (literally or figuratively); by implication, valor, victory
34.kj: force, mastery, might, mighty (act, power), power, strength.
34.dv: feminine passive participle from the same as H1368 (גִּבּוֹר);

35.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
35.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

35.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
35.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

35.gl: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
35.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

35.gl: to reign; inceptively, to ascend the throne; causatively, to induct into royalty; hence (by implication) to take counsel
35.kj: consult, [idiom] indeed, be (make, set a, set up) king, be (make) queen, (begin to, make to) reign(-ing), rule, [idiom] surely.

35.gl: to lie down (for rest, sexual connection, decease or any other purpose)
35.kj: [idiom] at all, cast down, (lover-)lay (self) (down), (make to) lie (down, down to sleep, still with), lodge, ravish, take rest, sleep, stay.

35.gl: father, in a literal and immediate, or figurative and remote application
35.kj: chief, (fore-) father(-less), [idiom] patrimony, principal. Compare names in 'Abi-'.

36.gl: a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb)
36.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
36.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

36.gl: to reign; inceptively, to ascend the throne; causatively, to induct into royalty; hence (by implication) to take counsel
36.kj: consult, [idiom] indeed, be (make, set a, set up) king, be (make) queen, (begin to, make to) reign(-ing), rule, [idiom] surely.

36.gl: a cardinal number, eight (as if a surplus above the 'perfect' seven); also (as ordinal) eighth
36.dv: or שְׁמוֹנֶה; feminine שְׁמֹנָה; or שְׁמוֹנָה; apparently from H8082 (שָׁמֵן) through the idea of plumpness;

36.gl: a year (as a revolution of time)
Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity
36.dv: from H8280 (שָׂרָה) and H410 (אֵל); he will rule as God;
from the active participle of H8104 (שָׁמַר); watch-station;
